message:
fix(dolt): clean test tables in setupTestStore to prevent duplicate primary key errors

The shared Dolt SQL server retains data between test runs since cleanup only
removed temp dirs, not server-side data. Add cleanTestTables() that DELETEs
from all tables at the start of each test to ensure isolation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
